title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v1.13.1
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/skopeo.git):

| dist-git branch | error |
| --------------- | ----- |
| `f37` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/2979 |
| `f38` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/2981 |
| `rawhide` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/2980 |


You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body: We have ripped out the `golist` uses on the main branch, so this can be ignored. Or, @lsm5 , do you think it’s worth backporting that?
@mtrmac that's right. I forgot to cherrypick that change to release-1.13 so that's why this issue was triggered. I'll bump skopeo manually on fedora and cherry pick that change now.
